name: Procore PC-25S 25L Dry Cabinet
description: Procore PC-25L Dry Cabinet di lengkapi kontrol digital dan layar indikator LED. Kontrol digital berfungsi untuk melakukan penyetingan kelembaban udara secara otomatis.

features.Key Features :: Function : Reduce and maintain the humidity | Capacity : 25L dry box | Size : 26 x 28 x 35 cm | Packing Size : 41,5 x 31,5 x 36,0 cm | Power : <8W | Application Voltage : AC100-240V / DC 5V 2A
